mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workers Compensation Law in St. George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jared L. Mortenson at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workers Compensation Law serving St. George. Jared L. Mortenson, an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, has practiced law since 2008, with a sole focus on workers' compensation law. He is committed to assisting clients who have been denied benefits in obtaining the support they rightfully deserve. Mr. Mortenson is admitted to practice in Utah and the United States District Court. He earned his Bachelor's degree from Brigham Young University and holds a JD/MBA from the University of Alabama. He is a member of the Probate / Estate Planning Bar and the Utah Association for Justice. In his personal time, Mr. Mortenson enjoys supporting his children in their various activities and hobbies. To learn more about how Jared L. Mortenson can assist with your workers' compensation claim, contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 for a free consultation. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Jared L. Mortenson handle Workers Compensation Law cases in St. George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Jared L. Mortenson at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workers Compensation Law and serves clients in St. George and surrounding areas.
